stemHtml: A change from IFR to VFR is only acceptable when VFR is permitted in that airspace and when…

options.a: the PIC initiates the change using the specific phrase "cancel IFR flight".
options.b: the position of the change has been noted on the ATC flight plan for automatic cancellation.
options.c: the PIC has requested and obtained an ATC clearance and filed a special VFR flight plan.
options.d: ATC invites the PIC to change from IFR to VFR.
